vars.TAGLINE: The body's own repair signal, amplified.
vars.BULLET_1: Activates VEGFR2 + Akt/eNOS pathway — drives new blood vessel growth at injury sites.
vars.BULLET_2: Upregulates growth hormone receptor expression in tendon fibroblasts at mRNA + protein level.
vars.BULLET_3: Accelerates fibroblast migration via FAK-paxillin pathway — the cells that lay down collagen scaffolding.

vars.TAGLINE: GLP-1 + GIP. One molecule, two receptors.
vars.BULLET_1: Activates both GLP-1 and GIP receptors — first dual agonist in clinical use (Mounjaro, Zepbound).
vars.BULLET_2: Slows gastric emptying while amplifying glucose-dependent insulin secretion in the pancreas.
vars.BULLET_3: Activates satiety circuits in the hypothalamus — research shows up to 22.5% body weight reduction over 72 weeks (SURMOUNT-1 trial).

vars.TAGLINE: The cellular currency of energy and repair.
vars.BULLET_1: Essential coenzyme for ATP production — depletes with age, stress, and oxidative load.
vars.BULLET_2: Activates sirtuin family proteins (SIRT1, SIRT3) involved in mitochondrial biogenesis and DNA repair.
vars.BULLET_3: Substrate for PARP enzymes that respond to DNA damage and CD38 in immune signaling.

vars.TAGLINE: Synthetic Thymosin Beta-4. The body's actin organizer.
vars.BULLET_1: Binds G-actin to regulate cytoskeletal organization — fundamental to cell migration and tissue repair.
vars.BULLET_2: Promotes angiogenesis, wound healing, and reduces inflammation in animal models of injury.
vars.BULLET_3: Often paired with BPC-157 in research stacks for synergistic recovery effects.
vars.CITATION_SHORT: Goldstein et al · 2012 · Ann NY Acad Sci 1269(1)

vars.TAGLINE: The molecule that redefined obesity research.
vars.BULLET_1: GLP-1 receptor agonist with extended half-life (~7 days) — once-weekly dosing in clinical protocols.
vars.BULLET_2: Slows gastric emptying, enhances satiety, improves insulin response — multiple mechanisms reinforce each other.
vars.BULLET_3: STEP-1 trial: average 14.9% body weight reduction over 68 weeks vs 2.4% placebo.

vars.TAGLINE: A peptide encoded inside mitochondrial DNA.
vars.BULLET_1: Mitochondrial-derived peptide that improves insulin sensitivity in animal models of metabolic stress.
vars.BULLET_2: Activates AMPK signaling — the cellular energy sensor — to enhance glucose homeostasis.
vars.BULLET_3: Research links MOTS-c to exercise capacity, metabolic flexibility, and age-related decline pathways.

vars.TAGLINE: GHRH analog. Triggers your pituitary to do its own work.
vars.BULLET_1: 29-amino-acid GHRH analog — same pulsatile mechanism as endogenous GH-releasing hormone.
vars.BULLET_2: Stimulates pituitary GH release rather than supplying exogenous GH.
vars.BULLET_3: Research has explored applications in age-related GH decline, sleep architecture, and recovery markers.

vars.TAGLINE: The C-terminal of α-MSH. Anti-inflammatory in three letters.
vars.BULLET_1: Tripeptide (Lysine-Proline-Valine) — the active C-terminal fragment of alpha-melanocyte-stimulating hormone.
vars.BULLET_2: Research shows downregulation of NF-κB signaling — a master regulator of inflammation pathways.
vars.BULLET_3: Animal model studies explore applications in IBD, skin healing, and inflammatory bowel research.

COMPOUNDS.name: BPC-157
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Activates VEGFR2 pathway to drive blood vessel growth at injury sites and accelerates fibroblast migration.

COMPOUNDS.name: TB-500
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Synthetic Thymosin Beta-4 modulates cytoskeletal organization for cell migration and broad tissue repair.

COMPOUNDS.name: GHK-Cu
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Copper tripeptide that influences gene expression involved in extracellular matrix repair and antioxidant defense.

COMPOUNDS.name: Tirzepatide
COMPOUNDS.explainer: First-in-class dual receptor agonist; SURMOUNT-1 reported up to 22.5% mean body weight reduction at 72 weeks.

COMPOUNDS.name: Cagrilintide
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Long-acting amylin agonist explored in research as a complement to GLP-1 mechanisms — different appetite pathway.

COMPOUNDS.name: Semaglutide
COMPOUNDS.explainer: The molecule behind Ozempic and Wegovy. STEP-1 trial reported 14.9% body weight reduction at 68 weeks vs 2.4% placebo.

COMPOUNDS.name: NAD+
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Coenzyme essential for ATP production and sirtuin activation. Levels decline with age in published studies.

COMPOUNDS.name: Epitalon
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Russian research peptide investigated for telomerase activity and circadian regulation in animal models.

COMPOUNDS.name: MOTS-c
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Peptide encoded by mitochondrial DNA. Activates AMPK and improves metabolic flexibility in research.

COMPOUNDS.name: Semax
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Russian-developed neuropeptide investigated for BDNF expression, NGF modulation, and cerebral metabolism research.

COMPOUNDS.name: Selank
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Tetrapeptide explored in research for GABAergic modulation and cognitive performance under stress.

COMPOUNDS.name: Dihexa
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Hexapeptide investigated for synaptogenesis and BBB permeability in cognitive aging research models.

COMPOUNDS.name: DSIP
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Nonapeptide investigated for slow-wave sleep architecture in animal and human EEG research.

COMPOUNDS.name: Epitalon
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Pineal tetrapeptide explored for melatonin regulation and circadian rhythm research.

COMPOUNDS.name: Sermorelin
COMPOUNDS.explainer: GHRH analog that triggers nocturnal GH pulses — well-documented to align with deep-sleep architecture.

COMPOUNDS.name: HCG
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Activates LH receptor on Leydig cells — central to reproductive endocrinology research and HPG axis studies.

COMPOUNDS.name: Kisspeptin-10
COMPOUNDS.explainer: KISS1 receptor agonist — the gateway peptide that initiates the cascade triggering puberty and reproductive function.

COMPOUNDS.name: PT-141
COMPOUNDS.explainer: FDA-approved (Vyleesi) for HSDD; MC4R agonist with research applications in libido and sexual response pathways.

COMPOUNDS.name: GHK-Cu
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Modulates 4,000+ genes involved in extracellular matrix repair, antioxidant defense, and collagen synthesis in published studies.

COMPOUNDS.name: Snap-8
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Acetyl octapeptide investigated for expression-line softening through neurotransmitter release modulation.

COMPOUNDS.name: BPC-157
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Pentadecapeptide research extends beyond musculoskeletal to skin barrier integrity and angiogenesis at sites of dermal injury.

COMPOUNDS.name: Thymosin Alpha-1
COMPOUNDS.explainer: FDA-approved (Zadaxin) in 35+ countries for hepatitis. Modulates T-cell maturation and dendritic cell function in research.

COMPOUNDS.name: LL-37
COMPOUNDS.explainer: Endogenous host-defense peptide investigated for direct antimicrobial activity and immune signaling research.

COMPOUNDS.name: KPV
COMPOUNDS.explainer: C-terminal fragment of alpha-MSH. Downregulates NF-κB pathway in inflammation research models.

vars.QUOTE: Stable pentadecapeptide BPC 157 promotes healing of injured ligaments in rats with a dose-dependent effect.
vars.CITATION_FULL: Staresinic et al · J Orthop Res · 2003

vars.PRINCIPLE_BODY: Every compound ships with a manufacturer Certificate of Analysis available on request. Lot numbers are traceable. Purity is stated, not assumed. If we can't document it, we don't sell it.

vars.EXPLAINER_TEXT: NAD+ serves as the substrate for sirtuin deacetylases, which regulate mitochondrial biogenesis, DNA repair, and metabolic adaptation in published longevity research.

vars.PRINCIPLE_BODY: We don't make health claims. We don't imply therapeutic use. Every product description uses the language of research because that is the only honest framing for what we supply.

vars.QUOTE: Once-weekly subcutaneous semaglutide plus lifestyle intervention was associated with sustained, clinically relevant reduction in body weight.

vars.EXPLAINER_TEXT: MOTS-c, encoded in mitochondrial DNA, activates AMPK signaling — improving glucose uptake, metabolic flexibility, and exercise capacity in published research.
vars.DIAGRAM_SVG: <svg viewBox="0 0 400 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><marker id="arr2" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="6" refY="3" orient="auto"><path d="M0,0 L6,3 L0,6" fill="#00A0A8"/></marker></defs><ellipse cx="60" cy="100" rx="40" ry="26" fill="none" stroke="#E07C24" stroke-width="2"/><text x="60" y="98" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-weight="700" font-size="11" fill="#1A1C22">MITO-DNA</text><text x="60" y="112" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-weight="400" font-size="9" fill="#7A7D88">MOTS-c</text><line x1="100" y1="100" x2="148" y2="100" stroke="#00A0A8" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arr2)"/><circle cx="180" cy="100" r="30" fill="none" stroke="#00A0A8" stroke-width="2"/><text x="180" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-weight="700" font-size="13" fill="#1A1C22">AMPK</text><line x1="210" y1="100" x2="258" y2="100" stroke="#00A0A8" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arr2)"/><rect x="262" y="74" width="80" height="52" fill="none" stroke="#E07C24" stroke-width="2" rx="4"/><text x="302" y="96" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-weight="700" font-size="10" fill="#1A1C22">Glucose uptake</text><text x="302" y="112" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Barlow Condensed" font-weight="400" font-size="9" fill="#7A7D88">Metabolic flex</text></svg>

vars.PRINCIPLE_BODY: We source from a vetted set of manufacturers only. Not because we couldn't find more — because maintaining a short, auditable supply chain is more important than catalog breadth for its own sake.

vars.QUOTE: LL-37 functions at the interface of innate and adaptive immunity, with broad-spectrum antimicrobial activity and immune-modulating signaling.
vars.CITATION_FULL: Vandamme et al · Cell Mol Immunol · 2012

vars.SUMMARY: BPC-157 — a stomach-derived pentadecapeptide — has decades of research on tissue repair, fibroblast migration, and blood vessel growth at injury sites.
vars.CITATION: Sikiric et al · J Orthop Res 2003

vars.SUMMARY: Delta-Sleep-Inducing Peptide has been studied for sleep architecture, slow-wave amplification, and REM modulation in animal and human models.
Selank is a Russian-developed peptide investigated for cognitive markers, attention, and GABAergic signaling. Not a stimulant — a regulatory peptide.
GHK-Cu is a copper-binding tripeptide researched for follicular response, dermal regeneration, and collagen synthesis. Multi-decade literature.
NAD+ is a coenzyme central to mitochondrial function and metabolic recovery. Research investigates sirtuin pathways and oxidative-stress repair.
TB-500 is a fragment of thymosin beta-4. Research investigates actin organization, angiogenesis, and wound healing.
vars.CITATION: Goldstein et al · Ann NY Acad Sci 2012

vars.SUMMARY: MOTS-c is a mitochondrial-derived peptide. Research investigates cellular energy metabolism, AMPK signaling, and exercise capacity.
Snap-8 (acetyl octapeptide-3) has been studied as a topical research compound for acetylcholine-release modulation in facial muscles.
vars.CITATION: Blanes-Mira et al · Int J Cosmet Sci 2002

vars.SUMMARY: Thymosin alpha-1 is a 28-amino-acid peptide. Research investigates T-cell maturation, immune signaling, and cytokine modulation.
PT-141 (bremelanotide) is a melanocortin-receptor agonist. Research investigates MC3R/MC4R central pathways involved in sexual response.
Sermorelin is a GHRH analog studied for the growth-hormone axis and downstream endocrine cascade — research, not replacement.
Selank has been investigated for anxiolytic markers, monoamine modulation, and stress-response in research models.
Ipamorelin is a selective GH-secretagogue researched for its clean GH-pulse profile — without the cortisol or appetite spikes of older compounds.
vars.CITATION: Raun et al · Eur J Endocrinol 1998

vars.SUMMARY: GHK-Cu has been studied for collagen synthesis, fibroblast activation, dermal regeneration, and anti-glycation markers across hundreds of papers.
BPC-157 has a substantial literature for gastric protection, GI tissue repair, and mucosal integrity in animal models.
vars.CITATION: Sikiric et al · J Physiol Paris 2010

vars.SUMMARY: Semax is a synthetic ACTH-fragment derivative studied for nootropic effects, dopaminergic activity, and attention markers.
Cerebrolysin is a porcine-brain-derived peptide preparation investigated for neurotrophic factors, BDNF activity, and neuroprotection.
Oxytocin has a deep literature on bonding, social cognition, and anxiolytic markers in research contexts.
Kisspeptin-10 acts on the HPG axis. Research investigates LH/FSH signaling and testicular function in animal and human models.
vars.CITATION: Dhillo et al · J Clin Endocrinol Metab 2005

vars.SUMMARY: Glutathione is the body's master antioxidant. Research investigates oxidative-stress repair and cellular detoxification across decades.
Tesamorelin is a GHRH analog with a substantial literature on visceral fat metabolism in clinical research.
KPV is an anti-inflammatory tripeptide derived from α-MSH. Research investigates the melanocortin pathway and inflammatory markers.
Epitalon is a pineal-gland-derived peptide investigated for telomere length and cellular-aging markers.
vars.CITATION: Khavinson et al · Bull Exp Biol Med 2003

vars.SUMMARY: SS-31 (elamipretide) is a mitochondria-targeted antioxidant studied for ATP synthesis and mitochondrial integrity.
vars.CITATION: Birk et al · J Am Soc Nephrol 2014

vars.SUMMARY: Melanotan I is an α-MSH analog investigated for melanogenesis, photoprotection, and pigment-cell signaling.
Melanotan II is a non-selective α-MSH analog with research on melanogenesis and additional MC4R-related pathways.
Pinealon is a tripeptide derived from pineal-gland research. Studies investigate neuroprotection and cognitive-aging markers.
ARA-290 (cibinetide) is a tissue-protective EPO derivative. Research investigates peripheral neuropathy and small-fiber response.
AICAR is an AMPK activator studied as an exercise mimetic in metabolic research.
Vasoactive Intestinal Peptide research has investigated neuroinflammation and CIRS-related immune signaling.
A research-grade blend of BPC-157, GHK-Cu, and TB-500 — three compounds with non-redundant repair mechanisms (vasculature, matrix, cell migration).
Thymalin is a thymic-peptide preparation investigated for T-cell maturation and immune restoration in clinical research.
Dihexa is a BDNF analog researched for hippocampal synaptogenesis and cognitive markers in animal models.
A streamlined recovery + skin research blend — for the literature on collagen, matrix, and tissue-level repair.
B12 (methylcobalamin) is essential to methylation, nerve function, and energy metabolism.
Melatonin is a pineal hormone with extensive research on circadian regulation and sleep-onset markers.
BPC-157 and TB-500 are frequently studied together — overlapping but non-redundant mechanisms for tissue repair.
LL-37 (cathelicidin) is the human antimicrobial peptide. Research investigates wound-defense, immune signaling, and skin response.
vars.CITATION: Dürr et al · Biochim Biophys Acta 2006

vars.SUMMARY: KLOW is a multi-compound research blend formulated for comprehensive recovery research.
SLU-PP-332 is an ERR-α agonist investigated as an exercise mimetic — research has shown mitochondrial biogenesis and metabolic adaptations.
Combined GHRH (CJC-1295) and GH-secretagogue (Ipamorelin) research investigates pulsatile GH release and downstream effects.
CJC-1295 is a GHRH analog researched for pulsatile GH release and the half-life of endogenous secretion patterns.
vars.CITATION: Teichman et al · J Clin Endocrinol Metab 2006

vars.SUMMARY: A multi-compound research blend designed for comprehensive recovery investigation.
GHRP-6 is a ghrelin-receptor agonist studied for GH pulse and appetite regulation in research models.
IGF-DES is a truncated IGF-1 variant with research on localized anabolic signaling and receptor binding.
IGF-1 LR3 is a long-acting IGF-1 variant with research on anabolic signaling and growth-factor receptor activity.
